fastingProtocol.name: 16:8 Intermittent Fasting
rules: Morning run fasted — black coffee or water only
Break fast at noon with high protein meal
Last meal by 8 PM — no exceptions

macroTargets.calories: Slight deficit for recomp (-200 to -300 kcal)

recipes.name: Desayuno Chapín Recomp
recipes.subtitle: The Fast Breaker
ingredients: ½ taza frijoles negros parados (not fried)
steps: Heat pan with minimal oil spray
Scramble 3 eggs with salt and pepper
Warm black beans separately (do not fry)
Plate eggs, beans side by side
Top with sliced avocado and crumbled panela
Add fresh salsa on top

recipes.name: Pre-Ride Mosh Power
recipes.subtitle: Sustained Energy Bowl
ingredients: ½ taza mosh/avena cocida en agua
steps: Cook oats in water until thick
Stir in protein powder or yogurt off heat
Top with sliced banana and pumpkin seeds
Sprinkle cinnamon
Eat 60-90 minutes before training

recipes.name: Pollo a la Plancha Elevado
recipes.subtitle: The Builder
steps: Marinate chicken breast in lime juice, garlic, cumin, pepper
Grill on plancha until cooked through (165°F internal)
Roast sweet potato in oven 400°F for 35 min
Build large salad with mixed greens
Drizzle olive oil and lime dressing
Plate chicken over sweet potato and salad

recipes.name: Pepián Power Bowl
recipes.subtitle: Ancestral Fuel
steps: Toast pepitoria, tomatoes, and chile in dry pan
Blend toasted ingredients into thick sauce
Cook protein in pepián sauce until tender
Serve over brown rice
Add steamed vegetables on the side
One tortilla for scooping

recipes.name: Atún Ceviche Express
recipes.subtitle: Quick Protein Hit
steps: Drain tuna well
Mix with diced onion, tomato, cilantro
Squeeze lime juice over everything
Add chile and salt to taste
Top with avocado slices
Eat with tostadas or alone

recipes.name: Licuado Anabólico
recipes.subtitle: Muscle Shake
steps: Add all ingredients to blender
Blend until smooth
Add ice for thickness
Drink within 30 min post-workout

recipes.name: Egg & Bean Burrito Bowl
recipes.subtitle: Macro Balanced
steps: Scramble eggs with salt and pepper
Build bowl: rice base
Add beans, then scrambled eggs
Top with salsa verde, cheese, lettuce
Mix and eat

recipes.name: Camote & Pollo Meal Prep
recipes.subtitle: Sunday Prep Champion
steps: Cut chicken into portions, season heavily
Cube sweet potatoes
Roast everything on sheet pan at 400°F for 30-35 min
Steam broccoli and green beans
Divide into 4 containers
Refrigerate — good for 4 days
